name: Caramel Turnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and peel the turnips, cut into four pieces each.
2. Put the dried plums into water until they are half-soft.
3. Bring a pot of water to boil, add salt, and cook the turnips for about 15 minutes.
4. Wash and dry the vealchops.
5. Chop the plums and mix with mustard, salt, and pepper.
6. Place the turnips in a colander and let them drain thoroughly.
7. Wash the parsley and remove the leaves; discard the stems.
8. In a skillet, caramelize the sugar over medium heat, add the broth and vinegar, and simmer for about 5 minutes.
9. Add the turnips to the skillet and simmer another 5 minutes.
10. Divide the plum mixture evenly between two vealchops, add the parsley, and roll up each chop securely with a toothpick.
11. Heat oil in a deep pan, and fry the rolls on both sides for about 2 minutes until golden brown.
12. Follow the package instructions to heat the white sauce mix according to package directions, stirring constantly.
13. Gradually whisk in the butter into the hot sauce mixture.
14. Arrange the turnips on a serving platter, place the veal rolls on top, and pour some sauce over the meat. Garnish with additional parsley.
15. Serve any remaining sauce on the side.
